title: Erin Willis
compiled_truth: Erin Willis is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-23 to 2001-11-08), Erin Willis sent 2 and received 79 emails, totalling 81 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (1), [Nelson Neale](people/nelson-neale) (1), [Trena Mcfarland](people/trena-mcfarland) (1), [Heather Kendall](people/heather-kendall) (1), [Gary Hickerson](people/gary-hickerson) (1).
